chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Abdul Hamid Bhurgri Constitution Petition No. D-107 of 2026 [Irshad Ali Mirani Versus Government of Sindh and others] Petitioner: Irshad Ali Mirani, through Mr. Abdul Fatah Soomro, Advocate. Date of hearing: 24-02-2026 Date of order: 24-02-2026 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – The Petitioner, who claims to be a journalist, prays for a writ to the Shaheed Rani Benazir Bhutto Press Club, Naudero to admit the Petitioner as a member of the club. After briefly arguing the matter, learned counsel concedes that the aforesaid press club is not a person performing function of the State and, therefore, it is not amenable to writ jurisdiction under Article 199(a) of the Constitution of Pakistan. However, learned counsel submits that a writ can issue to “any person” under Article 199(c) of the Constitution of Pakistan for enforcement of a Fundamental Right. But then, admission to a private club does not fall within the Fundamental Rights enshrined in the Constitution of Pakistan. Therefore, the petition is not maintainable and is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Zulfiqar
